content: Fargate task metadata v4 (ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4, PV 1.4.0+) exposes container/task metadata and private ENI IPv4 addresses but NOT the public IP. Standard recipe to find public IP: read TaskARN/cluster from ${ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4}/task, call ecs:DescribeTasks to get the ENI attachment (networkInterfaceId), then ec2:DescribeNetworkInterfaces for Association.PublicIp; requires those IAM permissions on the task role. Alternative: skip discovery entirely and let server-side STUN learn the public IP (1:1 NAT on the Fargate ENI makes srflx candidates valid).
